name: Golden Orange Cake Using Basic Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9-cup bundt cake pan or baking pan, 13 x 9 x 2 inches.
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cake mix, buttermilk, sugar, baking soda, butter (or margarine), eggs, orange peel, and vanilla. Mix on low speed for about 30 seconds, scraping the sides of the bowl constantly.
2. Increase the speed to medium and continue mixing for an additional 4 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
3. Stir in the raisins and walnuts.
4. Bake until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 50-55 minutes.
5. Remove from the pan and let cool completely.
6. Drizzle with orange glaze.
Orange Glaze:
Mix 3 tablespoons butter or margarine (melted), 1 cup powdered sugar, and 2 teaspoons grated orange peel in a bowl. Stir until smooth, adding up to 2 tablespoons of orange juice as needed for the desired consistency.
